data.name: Goals_Field_GenreFilter_Hint
data.value: Only books with at least one of these genres count toward progress.

data.name: Goals_Delete_Confirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete "{0}"? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Goals_ExcludeBooks_Hint
data.value: Excluded books do not count toward this goal's progress.

data.name: Stats_NoRatedInCategory
data.value: No books rated in this category

data.name: Stats_Share_Subtitle
data.value: Choose a time period for your reading card

data.name: GettingStarted_Subtitle
data.value: Track the real first-run flows, replay the intro, and use the hub to cover the rest of the app.

data.name: GettingStarted_Missions_Subtitle
data.value: These missions complete only from real app actions.

data.name: GettingStarted_Atlas_Subtitle
data.value: Covered here without forcing risky or platform-dependent actions.

data.name: Shop_Plants_Description
data.value: Welcome to the Plant Shop! Buy plants to grow as you read. Each plant has unique growth rates and care requirements.

data.name: Shop_Plants_Empty_Body
data.value: Level up to unlock more plants!

data.name: Shop_HowPlantsGrow_Bullet1
data.value: 📖 One reading day = a day with at least 15 minutes of reading

data.name: Shop_HowPlantsGrow_Bullet5
data.value: ✨ Higher level = higher XP boost while reading

data.name: Shop_Decorations_Description
data.value: Decorate your shelves! Cosmetic items to make your bookshelf cosy and unique.

data.name: Shop_Ability_StreakGuardian
data.value: Automatically rescues a breaking reading streak once every 14 days.

data.name: Shop_Ability_EternalPhoenix
data.value: Revives itself and shields all other plants from dying.

data.name: Shop_Ability_StoryHeart
data.value: +25% XP, +25% level-up coins, +400 coins on sessions of 30 minutes or more, doubled plant growth, +2.5% of next-level XP on the first session of each day.

data.name: Reading_NoSession_Body
data.value: Start reading a book to begin a session.

data.name: Reading_BookNotFound_Body
data.value: The book for this reading session could not be loaded.

data.name: Reading_FocusHint
data.value: Focus on reading — this session is being tracked automatically

data.name: BookDetail_NotFound_Body
data.value: This book could not be loaded.

data.name: BookDetail_NotesHint
data.value: Write your thoughts, quotes, or analysis here. Auto-saved.

data.name: BookEdit_TropesHint
data.value: Select matching tropes based on your selected genres.

data.name: BookEdit_ShelvesHint
data.value: Assign this book to manual shelves. Auto-sort shelves are populated automatically.

data.name: BookEdit_NoManualShelves
data.value: No manual shelves available. Create them on the Bookshelf page.

data.name: BookEdit_SpineDisplayHint
data.value: Choose how the book spine should be displayed in the bookshelf

data.name: BookEdit_CoverModeRequires
data.value: Cover mode requires a cover image

data.name: Bookshelf_AutoSort_Hint
data.value: Auto-sort shelves automatically include books matching the status.

data.name: Bookshelf_NoPlantsAvailable
data.value: No plants available. Visit the shop?

data.name: Bookshelf_NoDecorationsAvailable
data.value: No decorations available. Visit the shop?

data.name: Bookshelf_DeleteShelf_Body
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this shelf? All items will be moved to the main shelf.

data.name: Wishlist_Empty_Hint
data.value: Tap + to add books you want to read

data.name: Wishlist_NotesPlaceholder
data.value: Why do you want to read this?

data.name: GoalHeader_Remaining
data.value: You have {0} books left to complete your yearly reading goal

data.name: GoalHeader_Complete
data.value: 🎉 Congratulations! You've completed your yearly reading goal!

data.name: GoalHeader_Exceeded
data.value: 🌟 Amazing! You've read {0} more books than your goal!

data.name: Session_StreakGuardianSaved
data.value: The Chronicle Tree saved your streak!

data.name: Streak_Caption
data.value: You kept your reading streak alive.

data.name: Review_LikeBody
data.value: If you're enjoying the app, we'd love a quick bit of feedback.

data.name: Review_StorePrompt
data.value: Would you like to rate BookHeart in the Play Store?

data.name: Review_StoreBody
data.value: We'll open the app's Play Store page.

data.name: DeleteModal_Warning_Body
data.value: The following data will also be deleted:

data.name: PrivacyBanner_Body
data.value: BookHeart uses Firebase Analytics and Crashlytics to help improve the app. No book titles, authors, notes or personal data are ever transmitted. You can disable both at any time in Settings.

data.name: FeatureSuggestion_Hint
data.value: Premium members can send ideas directly to the developer.

data.name: FeatureSuggestion_Placeholder
data.value: What would make BookHeart better for you?

data.name: FeatureSuggestion_Success
data.value: Thanks! Your email composer has been opened.

data.name: FeatureSuggestion_Error
data.value: Could not open the email composer.

data.name: UpgradeCard_Title
data.value: Unlock unlimited notes, quotes and plants

data.name: UpgradeCard_Body
data.value: Plus keeps every feature you love and removes the Free tier's soft limits.

data.name: Wrapped_Title
data.value: Your year in books, beautifully wrapped

data.name: Wrapped_Body
data.value: Unlock Premium to generate your Reading Wrapped card — heatmaps, top genres, authors and more.

data.name: PlantWidget_DeadMessage
data.value: Your plant has died. It can no longer provide XP boosts.

data.name: PlantWidget_Watered_Healthy
data.value: Last watered {0} day(s) ago. Doing great! 🌿

data.name: PlantDetail_DriedOut
data.value: This plant has dried out and can no longer be watered.

data.name: Startup_UpdateAvailable_Subtitle
data.value: A newer version of BookHeart is available on the Play Store.

data.name: Startup_UpdateAvailable_Body
data.value: You can start the update directly in the app. The download continues in the background, and you can finish the installation afterwards.

data.name: Startup_UpdateReady_Body
data.value: Install the update now to switch to the new version.

data.name: Onboarding_Skip_Body1
data.value: You can come back any time from Settings or the Getting Started hub.

data.name: Onboarding_Skip_Body2
data.value: Your guided missions will still stay available afterwards.

data.name: Onboarding_Step0_Body1
data.value: Track your books, build reading habits, and watch your progress grow over time.

data.name: Onboarding_Step0_Body2
data.value: This short tutorial shows the essentials so you can start quickly.

data.name: Onboarding_Step1_Body1
data.value: Start by creating your first entry with title, author, and optional cover image.

data.name: Onboarding_Step1_Body2
data.value: After adding a book, you can start sessions, track pages, and log progress.

data.name: Onboarding_Step2_Body1
data.value: You earn XP by reading, finishing books, and completing goals.

data.name: Onboarding_Step2_Body2
data.value: As you level up, your plants grow and you unlock more rewards in the shop.

data.name: Onboarding_Step3_Body
data.value: Rate completed books with 1-5 stars across six categories:

data.name: Onboarding_Area_Goals
data.value: Goals: create and track reading goals

data.name: Onboarding_Sub_Skip
data.value: You can reopen it any time.

data.name: Onboarding_Sub_Step3
data.value: Capture what made a book great.

data.name: Paywall_TrustNote
data.value: Cancel anytime in Google Play · Auto-renews until cancelled

data.name: Settings_PlusPremium_Subtitle
data.value: Manage your subscription and unlock more of BookHeart

data.name: Settings_Notifications_EnableDescription
data.value: Allow BookHeart to send you notifications

data.name: Settings_Notifications_DailyReminderDescription
data.value: Get a daily nudge to read

data.name: Settings_Shelf_BarDescription
data.value: The bottom bar of each shelf

data.name: Settings_Data_Subtitle
data.value: Save, restore, or erase your library

data.name: Settings_Danger_Description
data.value: Delete all your books, reading sessions, goals, plants, and reset your progress. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Settings_Help_Subtitle
data.value: Learn the app, replay the intro, or support development

data.name: Settings_Help_HideCtaDescription
data.value: Hide the Bookshelf prompt when checklist steps are still open

data.name: Settings_Privacy_Subtitle
data.value: Control which anonymous data BookHeart collects

data.name: Settings_Privacy_UsageStatsDescription
data.value: Helps us understand which features are being used. No book titles, authors or personal notes are transmitted.

data.name: Settings_Privacy_CrashReportsDescription
data.value: Sends an anonymous error report when the app crashes so the issue can be fixed. No personal data is included.

data.name: Settings_Privacy_DisableNote
data.value: When disabled, cached events and the anonymous device ID are reset. Data that was already transmitted cannot be recalled.

data.name: Settings_MoreInfo_DiagnosticsHint
data.value: If data is missing, screenshot this log and send it to support.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Overview_Body
data.value: BookHeart is an offline-first book tracking app. Your data is stored locally on your device and is never transmitted to our servers. We do not collect, store, or share any personal information.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Storage_Body
data.value: All your books, reading sessions, goals, plants, and settings are stored in a local database (SQLite) on your device. This data never leaves your device unless you explicitly use the Backup & Restore feature.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Camera_Body
data.value: BookHeart requests camera access solely for scanning book barcodes (ISBN). No photos or videos are captured, stored, or transmitted. Camera access is optional and can be denied without affecting other app features.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Network_Body
data.value: When you look up a book by ISBN, BookHeart sends the ISBN number to the Google Books API to retrieve book metadata (title, author, cover image). No personal data or device identifiers are included in these requests. The app functions fully offline without this feature.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_ThirdParty_Body
data.value: BookHeart uses three third-party services: the Google Books API for optional ISBN lookup, Firebase Analytics for anonymous usage statistics (Android only, enabled by default, opt-out under Settings → Privacy), and Firebase Crashlytics for anonymous crash reports (Android only, enabled by default, opt-out under Settings → Privacy). Firebase never receives book titles, authors, ISBNs, quotes, annotations, or personal notes — only coarse bucketed counts. The Android Advertising ID and Android ID are explicitly disabled.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Deletion_Body
data.value: You can delete all your data at any time using the "Delete All Data" option in Settings. Uninstalling the app also removes all stored data from your device.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Children_Body
data.value: BookHeart does not knowingly collect any information from children. The app does not require account creation or any personal information to function.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Changes_Body
data.value: Any changes to this privacy policy will be reflected in app updates. The "Last updated" date at the top indicates the most recent revision.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Contact_Body
data.value: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please open an issue on our GitHub repository or contact us via the Play Store listing.

data.name: Settings_Delete_Success_Body
data.value: All your data has been deleted. Starting fresh!

data.name: Settings_Language_Description
data.value: BookHeart will restart after changing the language

data.name: Settings_Restart_BackupBody
data.value: BookHeart is restarting to finish loading your data…

data.name: Settings_Restart_LanguageBody
data.value: BookHeart is restarting to apply the new language…

data.name: Lookup_NoBookFound
data.value: No book found with this ISBN

data.name: Lookup_NoBookFoundDot
data.value: No book found for this ISBN.

data.name: Lookup_NoInternet
data.value: No internet connection. Please check your network and try again.

data.name: Lookup_QuotaReached
data.value: Google Books API quota reached. Please try again later.

data.name: Lookup_Timeout
data.value: Request timed out. Please try again.

data.name: Error_DbInitializing
data.value: Database is still initializing. Please try again.

data.name: Error_PlantRequiresLevel
data.value: This plant requires level {0}. You are currently level {1}.

data.name: Error_NotEnoughCoins
data.value: Not enough coins. You need {0} coins but only have {1}.

data.name: Error_NotEnoughCoinsShort
data.value: Not enough coins. You need {0} but only have {1}.

data.name: Error_NotificationPermissionDenied
data.value: Notification permission was denied. Please enable it in your device settings.

data.name: Error_FilePickCancelled
data.value: File selection failed or was cancelled. If you selected a file from Google Drive, try saving it to your device storage first.

data.name: Error_RestoreDbInitFailed
data.value: Cannot restore: database initialization failed earlier. Please restart BookHeart and try again. ({0}: {1})

data.name: Notification_Reminder_Body
data.value: Don't forget your daily reading session

data.name: Notification_Plant_Body
data.value: {0} is thirsty! Give it some water to keep it healthy.

data.name: Validator_Book_PageCountPositive
data.value: Page count must be greater than 0

data.name: Validator_Book_CurrentPageMax
data.value: Current page cannot exceed total page count

data.name: Validator_Book_DateStartedFuture
data.value: Start date cannot be in the future

data.name: Validator_Book_DateCompletedFuture
data.value: Completion date cannot be in the future

data.name: Validator_Book_DateCompletedBeforeStart
data.value: Completion date must be after start date

data.name: Validator_Goal_TargetPositive
data.value: Target value must be greater than 0

data.name: Validator_Goal_EndAfterStart
data.value: End date must be after start date

data.name: Validator_Session_StartedFuture
data.value: Start time cannot be in the future

data.name: Validator_Session_EndAfterStart
data.value: End time must be after start time

data.name: Validator_Session_EndFuture
data.value: End time cannot be in the future

data.name: Validator_Session_MinutesPositive
data.value: Reading duration must be greater than 0

data.name: Validator_Session_MinutesMax
data.value: Reading duration cannot exceed 24 hours (1440 minutes)

data.name: Validator_Plant_LevelMin
data.value: Current level must be at least 1

data.name: Validator_Plant_PlantedFuture
data.value: Planted date cannot be in the future

data.name: Validator_Plant_LastWateredFuture
data.value: Last watered date cannot be in the future

data.name: Error_FailedTo_UpdateGettingStartedVisibility
data.value: Failed to update Getting Started visibility

data.name: Error_FailedTo_UpdateShelfLedgeColor
data.value: Failed to update shelf ledge color

data.name: Error_FailedTo_UpdateShelfBaseColor
data.value: Failed to update shelf base color

data.name: Error_FailedTo_UpdateCrashReportingSettings
data.value: Failed to update crash reporting settings

data.name: Error_FailedTo_GenerateBookRecommendationCard
data.value: Failed to generate book recommendation card

data.name: Error_FailedTo_GenerateBookShareCard
data.value: Failed to generate book share card

data.name: Error_FailedTo_RefreshAppUpdateState
data.value: Failed to refresh app update state

data.name: Error_FailedTo_ApplyGooglePlayPurchase
data.value: Failed to apply Google Play purchase

data.name: Error_FailedTo_MoveBookToShelf
data.value: Failed to move book to shelf

data.name: Error_FailedTo_RemoveBookFromShelf
data.value: Failed to remove book from shelf

data.name: Error_FailedTo_MoveItemBetweenShelves
data.value: Failed to move item between shelves

data.name: PlantSpecies_StarterSprout_Description
data.value: A simple plant for beginners. Grows quickly!

data.name: PlantSpecies_StorySeedling_Description
data.value: A growing seedling nurtured by stories.

data.name: PlantSpecies_BookwormFern_Description
data.value: A lush fern for dedicated readers.

data.name: PlantSpecies_LiteraryLily_Description
data.value: A beautiful lily that blooms with every chapter.

data.name: PlantSpecies_WisdomWillow_Description
data.value: A wise tree that stands the test of time.

data.name: PlantSpecies_MysticTomeTree_Description
data.value: A legendary tree with leaves like parchment.

data.name: PlantSpecies_ChronicleTree_Description
data.value: An ancient chronicle tree whose leaves resemble parchment from bygone eras. When your reading streak threatens to break, it preserves the story of your journey.

data.name: PlantSpecies_EternalPhoenixBonsai_Description
data.value: A sacred bonsai whose golden leaves glow with the wisdom of countless books. While it watches your garden, no plant shall die — and it rises from its own ashes again and again.

data.name: ShopItem_ReadingCandle_Description
data.value: A warm flickering candle — the perfect reading companion.

data.name: ShopItem_CosyBookMug_Description
data.value: A ceramic mug with a book-spine pattern. Always full.

data.name: ShopItem_WoodenBookend_Description
data.value: A hand-carved oak bookend. Your books deserve a proper brace.

data.name: ShopItem_BrassHourglass_Description
data.value: Measure your reading sessions in style.

data.name: ShopItem_ScholarSSpectacles_Description
data.value: Round brass-rimmed glasses. Any shelf gains +10 distinguished.

data.name: ShopItem_InkwellQuill_Description
data.value: A glass inkwell with a raven feather quill. Timeless.

data.name: ShopItem_OwlFigurine_Description
data.value: A ceramic owl. Wise observer of your reading habits.

data.name: ShopItem_LibraryGlobe_Description
data.value: A vintage brass globe. Explore worlds between the shelves.

data.name: ShopItem_MarbleBookend_Description
data.value: Carved marble bookends — heavy, elegant, permanent.

data.name: ShopItem_BrassTelescope_Description
data.value: A miniature brass telescope. For reading between the stars.

data.name: ShopItem_MagicReadingLamp_Description
data.value: An enchanted desk lamp that never runs out of oil.

data.name: ShopItem_DragonFigurine_Description
data.value: A tiny dragon perched on your shelf. He's read everything.

data.name: ShopItem_AlchemyFlask_Description
data.value: A glowing green flask of unknown purpose. Do not drink.

data.name: ShopItem_AncientScroll_Description
data.value: A sealed scroll of immense wisdom. Or a grocery list. Who knows.

data.name: ShopItem_HeartOfStories_Description
data.value: The heart of the library — a pulsing relic in warm beige. The ultimate reward for every reader who never gives up. Its magic permeates every aspect of your journey.

data.name: Feature_UnlimitedNotesAndQuotes_Description
data.value: Write as many notes and quotes per book as you want — no 3-per-book cap.

data.name: Feature_UnlimitedReadingGoals_Description
data.value: Track as many goals as you want — no 3-goal cap.

data.name: Feature_ReadingGoalsWithGenreTropeFilter_Description
data.value: Only count books from specific genres or tropes toward your goal.

data.name: Feature_UnlimitedShelves_Description
data.value: Organize your library in as many shelves as you like — no 3-shelf cap.

data.name: Feature_CustomShelfColors_Description
data.value: Paint each shelf with its own ledge and base color.

data.name: Feature_StandardPlantsAndDecorations_Description
data.value: Unlock the full shop beyond the 4 starter plants and 3 starter decorations.

data.name: Feature_PrestigePlants_Description
data.value: Grow the Chronicle Tree and the Eternal Phoenix Bonsai with unique bonuses.

data.name: Feature_UltimateDecorations_Description
data.value: Place the Heart of Stories for boosted XP, coins and plant growth.

data.name: Feature_StatsTrendsTab_Description
data.value: Heatmaps, weekday patterns, reading-time distribution and genre radar.

data.name: Feature_StatsInsightsTab_Description
data.value: Year-over-year comparisons, top authors, completion rates and more.

data.name: Feature_ShareCards_Description
data.value: Generate your Reading Wrapped and book-recommendation cards as beautiful images.

data.name: Feature_Wishlist_Description
data.value: Keep a prioritized list of books you want to read next.

data.name: Feature_Tropes_Description
data.value: Tag books with tropes and filter your library by them.

data.name: Feature_PremiumThemes_Description
data.value: Pick from additional color themes beyond the default.

data.name: Feature_FeatureSuggestionForm_Description
data.value: Send feature requests directly to the developer from inside the app.

data.name: Feature_FamilySharing_Description
data.value: Share your Premium subscription with up to 5 family members.
